overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City during golden hour. The character travels from a busy street with gas stations and holographic billboards, crosses an intersection with a large truck passing by, and descends to a lower pedestrian path alongside elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with gas station and holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: man in leather jacket walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with multiple balconies rising in the distance
green and yellow gas station roof with fuel pumps underneath
tall structure displaying large holographic advertisements including a red figure
tall palm tree lining the street near the gas station
white painted lines marking pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk next to a gas station. The tall residential tower dominates the center background while holographic billboards glow on the right. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the camera moves steadily forward toward the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with Valencia street sign and futuristic architecture

events.description: large blue industrial truck drives past from left to right, temporarily blocking the view
approaching lower pedestrian path alongside elevated highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street intersection and continuing past the Valencia sign while navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: large blue industrial truck driving across the intersection from left to right
woman with red hair standing near the Valencia street sign

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading Valencia mounted on a pole
large modern structure with reflective blue glass facade and geometric patterns
industrial tower with large white 06 numerals displayed on the side
raised concrete highway structure curving through the background
multi-level parking garage with large entry openings and geometric facade

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the intersection as a large blue truck passes by. The Valencia street sign becomes visible on the left, while futuristic glass buildings and the industrial tower 06 dominate the background. The scene transitions from the commercial street to an area with elevated highway infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower pedestrian path with retaining walls and homeless encampments

events.description: descending to lower level path alongside concrete retaining wall with elevated highway overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the lower path toward the sun, passing homeless encampments and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground next to bags and belongings

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running alongside the pedestrian path with metal railings on top
roofed pedestrian walkway with fluorescent lighting extending overhead
piles of bags, tarps, and belongings indicating temporary shelter areas
multi-level highway interchange with concrete supports and decking

segments.scene_description: The character descends to a lower pedestrian path running alongside a concrete retaining wall. The area is more enclosed with elevated highways overhead and homeless encampments visible on the left. The sun creates a strong backlight as the character continues walking toward the highway interchange in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, commercial urban street into the shadowed underbelly of a highway interchange. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk beside a gas station, moving past glowing holographic billboards and pedestrians toward a towering residential building in the distance. As the camera reaches the intersection, the scene shifts through the passage of a large blue truck and past a Valencia street sign, transitioning from the open commercial district toward industrial glass towers. The perspective then descends from the street level to a lower pedestrian path, where the environment becomes more enclosed by concrete retaining walls and overhead highway infrastructure. Finally, the camera moves past homeless encampments under a strong golden backlight, heading deeper into the industrial landscape toward a distant highway interchange.
